papers.title: TGF-β mediates epigenetic control of innate antiviral responses and SIV reservoir size
papers.summary: Epigenetic programming of myeloid and CD4+ T cells promotes decay of the SIV reservoir in rhesus macaques and a similar molecular pathway is found in HIV elite controllers
papers.llm_title_zh: TGF-β介导先天性抗病毒反应及SIV储存库大小的表观遗传调控
papers.llm_title_bilingual: TGF-β介导先天性抗病毒反应及SIV储存库大小的表观遗传调控 / TGF-β mediates epigenetic control of innate antiviral responses and SIV reservoir size
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 本研究探讨TGF-β是否通过表观遗传调控髓系细胞和CD4+ T细胞的先天性抗病毒反应，从而影响恒河猴SIV储存库大小，并评估类似分子通路是否存在于HIV精英控制者中。
llm_highlights_zh: TGF-β通过表观遗传机制调控先天性抗病毒反应及SIV储存库大小。
在恒河猴中，髓系细胞与CD4+ T细胞的表观遗传重编程与SIV储存库衰减相关。
类似分子通路也见于HIV精英控制者，提示其可能具有跨物种与转化研究意义。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 研究指出，髓系细胞和CD4+ T细胞的表观遗传编程可促进恒河猴SIV储存库的衰减；同时，在HIV精英控制者中也观察到相似的分子通路，提示TGF-β介导的表观遗传调控可能参与病毒储存库控制。

papers.title: The B cell receptor–mTOR signaling axis restricts the accumulation of lung tissue–resident memory B cells after influenza infection
papers.abstract: Lung tissue-resident memory B (BRM) cells are important in establishing protective immunity against respiratory pathogens. However, the pathways regulating the accumulation of lung BRM cells are poorly understood. Here, we show that the transcription factors NFATC1 (nuclear factor of activated T cells 1) and EGR2 (early growth response 2) repress lung BRM cell accumulation after influenza infection, whereas IKZF1 (IKAROS family zinc finger 1) enhances it. IKZF1 restrains B cell receptor (BCR) and mTOR (mechanistic target of rapamycin) signaling and is highly expressed in lung BRM cells during their development. Lung BRM cells display reduced expression of genes associated with BCR and mTOR signaling pathways. Overexpression of a degradation-resistant form of SYK downstream of the BCR restricted lung BRM cell accumulation. Conversely, inhibition of mTOR using rapamycin reduced NFATC1 and EGR2 expression and promoted lung BRM cell accumulation. These findings establish how the BCR-mTOR signaling axis regulates mucosal B cell responses after influenza infection.
affiliations: Department of Medicine, Washington University School of Medicine, St. Louis, MO, USA.
Veterans Administration Hospital, St. Louis, MO, USA.
papers.llm_title_zh: B细胞受体–mTOR信号轴限制流感感染后肺组织驻留记忆B细胞的积累
papers.llm_title_bilingual: B细胞受体–mTOR信号轴限制流感感染后肺组织驻留记忆B细胞的积累 / The B cell receptor–mTOR signaling axis restricts the accumulation of lung tissue–resident memory B cells after influenza infection
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 流感感染后，B细胞受体（BCR）-mTOR信号轴及相关转录因子如何调控肺组织驻留记忆B细胞的积累？
llm_highlights_zh: 流感感染后，NFATC1与EGR2抑制肺组织驻留记忆B细胞积累，而IKZF1促进其积累。
肺组织驻留记忆B细胞发育过程中高表达IKZF1，并呈现BCR与mTOR信号相关基因表达下调。
增强BCR下游SYK信号限制肺BRM细胞积累，而雷帕霉素抑制mTOR可促进其积累。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 发表于《Science Immunology》2026年3月，第11卷第117期。
papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh: 肺组织驻留记忆B（BRM）细胞对于建立针对呼吸道病原体的保护性免疫至关重要。然而，调控肺BRM细胞积累的通路目前尚不清楚。本文显示，在流感感染后，转录因子NFATC1（活化T细胞核因子1）和EGR2（早期生长反应2）抑制肺BRM细胞的积累，而IKZF1（IKAROS家族锌指蛋白1）则促进其积累。IKZF1可抑制B细胞受体（BCR）及mTOR（雷帕霉素机械靶蛋白）信号，并在肺BRM细胞发育过程中呈高表达。肺BRM细胞表现出与BCR和mTOR信号通路相关基因表达降低的特征。过表达一种抗降解的BCR下游SYK形式可限制肺BRM细胞积累。相反，使用雷帕霉素抑制mTOR可降低NFATC1和EGR2的表达，并促进肺BRM细胞积累。上述发现阐明了BCR-mTOR信号轴如何在流感感染后调控黏膜B细胞应答。

papers.title: Macrophages restrict tumor immune infiltration by controlling collagen topography
papers.abstract: During tumorigenesis, the extracellular matrix is extensively remodeled. Whereas the impact of such remodeling on tumor growth and invasion is well described, the consequences on immune infiltration are not well understood. Combining tissue imaging and machine learning, we show that immune cell localization in tumors can be predicted by the local topography of fibrillar collagens. Such topographies are dictated by a fibrotic pathway driven by transcription factor 4 (Tcf4) in both cancer and stromal cells, which promotes collagen III deposition and results in intermingled collagen networks that favor intratumor infiltration of T cells and neutrophils. Macrophages inhibit this pathway, highlighting their key structural role in shaping the tumor extracellular matrix. Reanalysis of data from human solid tumors revealed a strong correlation between TCF4, COL3A1, and T cell and neutrophil signatures. Together, our data identify collagen network topographies as a key regulator of tumor-infiltrating immune cells.

papers.llm_title_zh: 巨噬细胞通过控制胶原拓扑结构限制肿瘤免疫浸润
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 巨噬细胞通过控制胶原拓扑结构限制肿瘤免疫浸润 / Macrophages restrict tumor immune infiltration by controlling collagen topography
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 肿瘤细胞外基质中胶原拓扑结构如何影响免疫细胞浸润，以及巨噬细胞是否通过调控Tcf4相关纤维化通路来限制肿瘤免疫浸润？
llm_highlights_zh: 肿瘤内免疫细胞定位可由局部纤维状胶原的拓扑结构预测。
Tcf4驱动的纤维化程序促进Ⅲ型胶原沉积，并形成有利于T细胞和中性粒细胞肿瘤内浸润的交织胶原网络。
巨噬细胞通过抑制该通路限制免疫浸润，提示其在塑造肿瘤细胞外基质结构中的关键作用。
papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh: 在肿瘤发生过程中，细胞外基质会发生广泛重塑。尽管这种重塑对肿瘤生长和侵袭的影响已有较充分描述，但其对免疫浸润的后果尚未得到充分理解。本文结合组织成像与机器学习，表明肿瘤中免疫细胞的定位可由局部纤维状胶原的拓扑结构加以预测。该类拓扑结构由癌细胞和基质细胞中转录因子4（Tcf4）驱动的纤维化通路所决定，该通路促进Ⅲ型胶原沉积，并形成交织的胶原网络，从而有利于T细胞和中性粒细胞向肿瘤内部浸润。巨噬细胞可抑制这一通路，凸显其在塑造肿瘤细胞外基质中的关键结构性作用。对人类实体瘤数据的再分析显示，TCF4、COL3A1与T细胞及中性粒细胞特征之间存在强相关性。综上，研究将胶原网络拓扑结构确定为调控肿瘤浸润免疫细胞的重要因素。

papers.title: Immune mechanisms of congenital Zika syndrome
papers.abstract: Zika virus (ZIKV) infection during pregnancy can adversely affect mother and child. ZIKV can vertically transmit from mother to fetus, especially during early pregnancy, to cause congenital Zika syndrome (CZS), which includes microcephaly, ocular and musculoskeletal defects, and other disorders. Whereas human clinical studies have provided crucial insights into how ZIKV affects pregnancy, animal models have uncovered mechanisms of fetal disease. This Review discusses fetal immunological factors that contribute to or protect from CZS, as well as the interplay between maternal and fetal immunity, viral molecular factors, maternal nutrition, and metabolic changes to fetal ZIKV infection and disease outcomes. We also consider how factors like preexisting flavivirus immunity and gene polymorphisms may affect CZS risk, with implications for vaccine and therapeutic development. There are insights to be gained from studying ZIKV disease for our improved understanding of congenital infections and the functioning of the immune system in early life.
affiliations: Programme in Emerging Infectious Diseases, Duke-National University of Singapore Medical School, Singapore 169857, Singapore.
Department of Pathology, Duke University Medical Center, Durham, NC 27705, USA.
Department of Microbiology and Immunology, Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine, National University of Singapore, Singapore, Singapore.
SingHealth Duke-NUS Global Health Institute, Singapore, Singapore.
SingHealth Duke-NUS Maternal and Child Health Research Institute, Singapore, Singapore.
papers.llm_title_zh: 先天性寨卡综合征的免疫机制
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 先天性寨卡综合征的免疫机制 / Immune mechanisms of congenital Zika syndrome
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 妊娠期寨卡病毒感染中，哪些胎儿免疫因素及母胎免疫、病毒分子特征、母体营养与代谢、既往黄病毒免疫和宿主遗传差异共同决定先天性寨卡综合征的发生风险与疾病结局？
llm_highlights_zh: 妊娠期寨卡病毒感染可经母胎垂直传播，导致先天性寨卡综合征及小头畸形、眼部和肌肉骨骼异常等表现。
本文综述胎儿免疫因素及母胎免疫互作如何影响胎儿感染与疾病结局，并结合动物模型阐释相关机制。
既往黄病毒免疫、基因多态性、母体营养与代谢改变可能调节先天性寨卡综合征风险，对疫苗和治疗开发具有意义。
papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh: 妊娠期寨卡病毒（ZIKV）感染可对母亲和胎儿/新生儿造成不良影响。ZIKV可由母体垂直传播至胎儿，尤其在妊娠早期，从而引发先天性寨卡综合征（CZS），其表现包括小头畸形、眼部和肌肉骨骼缺陷以及其他异常。尽管人类临床研究为理解ZIKV如何影响妊娠提供了关键见解，动物模型则揭示了胎儿疾病发生的机制。本文综述了促成或保护机体免于发生CZS的胎儿免疫学因素，以及母体与胎儿免疫、病毒分子因素、母体营养和代谢变化如何共同影响胎儿ZIKV感染及其疾病结局。作者还讨论了既往黄病毒免疫和基因多态性等因素可能如何影响CZS风险，并指出这些认识对疫苗和治疗策略开发具有启示意义。对ZIKV疾病的研究也有助于深化我们对先天性感染及生命早期免疫系统功能的理解。

papers.title: Erratum for the Research Article “TCRγ constant usage tunes human γδ T cell antigen sensitivity, thymic programming, and peripheral function”
papers.llm_title_zh: 研究论文“TCRγ恒定区使用调节人γδ T细胞的抗原敏感性、胸腺程序化及外周功能”的勘误
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 《研究论文“TCRγ恒定区使用调节人γδ T细胞的抗原敏感性、胸腺程序化及外周功能”的勘误》 / Erratum for the Research Article “TCRγ constant usage tunes human γδ T cell antigen sensitivity, thymic programming, and peripheral function”
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 本文为勘误，旨在更正原研究文章《TCRγ constant usage tunes human γδ T cell antigen sensitivity, thymic programming, and peripheral function》中的相关内容；当前来源未提供具体更正细节。
llm_highlights_zh: 本文为已发表研究文章的勘误通知。
期刊为《Science Immunology》，发表于2026年3月20日。
当前来源未提供摘要、作者及关键词等具体内容。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 《Science Immunology》2026年3月，第11卷，第117期。本条目为研究文章《TCRγ constant usage tunes human γδ T cell antigen sensitivity, thymic programming, and peripheral function》的勘误通知。

papers.title: Whole-genome prediction of bacterial pathogenic capacity on novel bacteria using protein language models with PathogenFinder2
papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Infectious diseases continue to be a leading cause of mortality and pose a significant global health threat. Thus, the development of tools for surveillance and early detection of emerging pathogens is needed. Results We introduce PathogenFinder2, a novel, alignment-free, taxonomy-agnostic model for predicting bacterial pathogenic capacity in humans using protein language models. It outperforms previous methods, particularly for novel taxa, and provides interpretable outputs by highlighting proteins most relevant to pathogenic potential. These insights aid the identification of virulence factors, vaccine targets, and infection-related metabolic pathways. Furthermore, we introduce the Bacterial Pathogenic Capacity Landscape, which reveals patterns linked to host condition, infection site, microbial antagonism, and environmental origin. Availability The model is freely available online at https://genepi.dk/pathogenfinder2 , or as a standalone program ( https://github.com/genomicepidemiology/PathogenFinder2 )
papers.llm_title_zh: 利用PathogenFinder2结合蛋白质语言模型对新型细菌进行细菌致病能力的全基因组预测
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 利用PathogenFinder2结合蛋白质语言模型对新型细菌进行细菌致病能力的全基因组预测 / Whole-genome prediction of bacterial pathogenic capacity on novel bacteria using protein language models with PathogenFinder2
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何利用基于蛋白质语言模型的全基因组方法，在不依赖序列比对和分类学先验的情况下，准确预测新型细菌对人类的致病能力，并提供具有生物学解释性的结果？
llm_highlights_zh: PathogenFinder2是一种基于蛋白质语言模型的全基因组、免比对且不依赖分类学信息的细菌致病能力预测方法。
该模型在人类细菌致病潜力预测中优于既有方法，尤其适用于新分类群细菌的判别。
模型可提供可解释输出，定位与致病潜力相关的关键蛋白，并辅助识别毒力因子、疫苗靶点及感染相关代谢通路。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 感染性疾病仍是导致死亡的重要原因，并构成全球公共卫生威胁，因此亟需用于监测和早期识别新发病原体的工具。该研究提出PathogenFinder2，这是一种新的、免比对且不依赖分类学信息的模型，利用蛋白质语言模型预测细菌对人类的致病能力。结果显示，该方法优于既往模型，尤其在新分类群细菌上的表现更佳；同时可通过突出显示与致病潜力最相关的蛋白质提供可解释性输出。这些信息有助于识别毒力因子、疫苗靶点以及感染相关代谢通路。研究还提出“细菌致病能力图谱”，揭示了与宿主状态、感染部位、微生物拮抗作用及环境来源相关的模式。模型可在线使用，亦提供独立程序版本。

papers.title: SpliceHarmonization: an integrated method for identifying RNA splicing events in therapeutics for splicing modulation
papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Splicing, a critical co-transcriptional process in eukaryotes, enhances transcriptome diversity by generating isoforms specific to cell types, tissues, or developmental stages. Recent advancements in splicing modulators have opened new avenues for targeting previously undruggable genes by inducing significant perturbations in splicing events. These developments underscore the need for comprehensive methods to accurately identify and compare splicing events. While several tools have been developed to detect local splice variants, inconsistencies across methods remain a significant challenge. To address this, we present SpliceHarmonization, an integrated approach that combines the strengths of rMATS, LeafCutter, and MAJIQ, enabling robust and reliable splicing analysis with event type annotations. Results In a comprehensive evaluation using diverse simulated datasets, SpliceHarmonization streamlined and standardized the outputs from three detection methods into a unified format, thereby improving splicing detection with event type annotation and outperforming individual methods. By integrating the outputs from rMATS, LeafCutter and MAJIQ, our approach not only enhanced identification of a wide range of splicing events but also effectively mitigated method-specific discrepancies. This integration led to an accuracy exceeding 0.8 and a recall of up to 0.5, with an observed increase in AUC of up to 10%. Furthermore, SpliceHarmonization demonstrated high sensitivity in detecting low-abundance and complex splicing events, providing annotations including genomic coordinates and event type. Availability and implementation SpliceHarmonization is available at https://github.com/interactivereport/SpliceHarmonization
papers.abstract:
MOTIVATION: Splicing, a critical co-transcriptional process in eukaryotes, enhances transcriptome diversity by generating isoforms specific to cell types, tissues, or developmental stages. Recent advancements in splicing modulators have opened new avenues for targeting previously undruggable genes by inducing significant perturbations in splicing events. These developments underscore the need for comprehensive methods to accurately identify and compare splicing events. While several tools have been developed to detect local splice variants, inconsistencies across methods remain a significant challenge. To address this, we present SpliceHarmonization, an integrated approach that combines the strengths of rMATS, LeafCutter, and MAJIQ, enabling robust and reliable splicing analysis with event type annotations.

RESULTS: In a comprehensive evaluation using diverse simulated datasets, SpliceHarmonization streamlined and standardized the outputs from three detection methods into a unified format, thereby improving splicing detection with event type annotation and outperforming individual methods. By integrating the outputs from rMATS, LeafCutter and MAJIQ, our approach not only enhanced identification of a wide range of splicing events but also effectively mitigated method-specific discrepancies. This integration led to an accuracy exceeding 0.8 and a recall of up to 0.5, with an observed increase in AUC of up to 10%. Furthermore, SpliceHarmonization demonstrated high sensitivity in detecting low-abundance and complex splicing events, providing annotations including genomic coordinates and event type.

AVAILABILITY AND IMPLEMENTATION: SpliceHarmonization is available at https://github.com/interactivereport/SpliceHarmonization.

SUPPLEMENTARY INFORMATION: Supplementary Materials and Supplementary Methods are available at Bioinformatics online. Supplementary Data is available at https://zenodo.org/records/15032402.
affiliations: Genomics and Computational Biology, Biomarkers and Systems Biology, Biogen Inc, Cambridge, MA 02142, United States.
Data Science, BioInfoRx Inc, Madison, WI 53719, United States.
papers.llm_title_zh: SpliceHarmonization：一种用于识别剪接调节治疗中RNA剪接事件的整合方法
papers.llm_title_bilingual: SpliceHarmonization：一种用于识别剪接调节治疗中RNA剪接事件的整合方法 / SpliceHarmonization: an integrated method for identifying RNA splicing events in therapeutics for splicing modulation
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 作者旨在解决现有RNA剪接事件检测工具之间结果不一致的问题，评估一种整合rMATS、LeafCutter与MAJIQ输出的方法，是否能够更准确、稳健地识别并注释用于剪接调节治疗研究中的RNA剪接事件。
llm_highlights_zh: SpliceHarmonization整合rMATS、LeafCutter与MAJIQ，实现剪接事件检测结果的统一化与标准化。
在多样化模拟数据评估中，该方法整体性能优于单一工具，准确率超过0.8，AUC最高提升10%。
该方法对低丰度及复杂剪接事件具有较高敏感性，并可提供基因组坐标与事件类型注释。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 该研究提出SpliceHarmonization，用于整合rMATS、LeafCutter和MAJIQ三种RNA剪接检测工具的输出，并将结果标准化为统一格式。基于多种模拟数据集的评估显示，该方法在剪接事件识别、事件类型注释以及低丰度和复杂事件检测方面优于单一工具，准确率超过0.8，召回率最高达0.5，AUC最高提升10%。该工具可支持剪接调节治疗相关研究中的系统性剪接分析。
papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh:
【研究动机】剪接是真核生物中关键的共转录过程，通过产生具有细胞类型、组织或发育阶段特异性的异构体来增强转录组多样性。近年来，剪接调节剂的发展通过诱导显著的剪接事件扰动，为靶向以往难以成药的基因开辟了新途径。这些进展凸显了对全面方法的需求，以便准确识别和比较剪接事件。尽管已有多种工具可用于检测局部剪接变体，但不同方法之间结果不一致仍是重要挑战。为此，作者提出SpliceHarmonization，这是一种整合性方法，结合了rMATS、LeafCutter和MAJIQ的优势，可实现稳健且可靠的剪接分析，并提供事件类型注释。

【结果】在采用多种模拟数据集进行的综合评估中，SpliceHarmonization将3种检测方法的输出进行了梳理和标准化，统一为单一格式，从而提升了带有事件类型注释的剪接检测性能，并优于各单独方法。通过整合rMATS、LeafCutter和MAJIQ的输出，该方法不仅增强了对广泛剪接事件的识别能力，还有效减轻了方法特异性差异带来的影响。整合后准确率超过0.8，召回率最高可达0.5，AUC最高提升10%。此外，SpliceHarmonization在检测低丰度和复杂剪接事件方面表现出较高敏感性，并可提供包括基因组坐标和事件类型在内的注释信息。

【可获取性与实现】SpliceHarmonization可在https://github.com/interactivereport/SpliceHarmonization获取。

【补充信息】补充材料与补充方法可于Bioinformatics在线版获取；补充数据可见https://zenodo.org/records/15032402。

papers.title: SA2E: spatial-aware auto-encoder for cell type deconvolution of spatial transcriptomics data
papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Spatial transcriptomics (ST) technologies measure gene expression together with spatial locations, but each spot typically contains a mixture of cell types, posing a challenge for downstream analysis. Cell-type deconvolution aims to infer spot-wise cell-type proportions by integrating single-cell RNA-seq (scRNA-seq) and ST data. Many existing methods construct cell-type signatures from predefined marker genes, which can limit performance when marker information is incomplete or unavailable. Results To address this limitation, we propose a spatial-aware auto-encoder framework (SA2E) for cell-type deconvolution without requiring predefined cell-type biomarkers. SA2E learns latent spot representations using a spatially regularized auto-encoder that preserves the local topology of the spot spatial graph. Based on these representations, SA2E learns cell-type signatures by enforcing them to reconstruct ST expression. In our framework, simulated ST data with known proportions are used for supervised pretraining, while real ST data are optimized using the reconstruction objective. Extensive experiments on simulated and real ST datasets demonstrate that SA2E outperforms state-of-the-art deconvolution baselines. Availability and implementation The code of SA2E is available at Github ( https://github.com/xkmaxidian/SA2E ) and Zenodo (
papers.llm_title_zh: 用于空间转录组数据细胞类型反卷积的空间感知自编码器
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 用于空间转录组数据细胞类型反卷积的空间感知自编码器 / SA2E: spatial-aware auto-encoder for cell type deconvolution of spatial transcriptomics data
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何在缺乏预定义细胞类型标志基因的情况下，结合空间转录组与单细胞RNA测序数据，利用空间信息实现spot水平的细胞类型比例准确反卷积？
llm_highlights_zh: 提出SA2E，一种无需预定义细胞类型标志物的空间感知自编码反卷积框架。
通过空间正则化自编码器学习保留局部空间拓扑的spot潜在表示，并据此学习细胞类型特征。
在模拟与真实空间转录组数据上的实验表明，SA2E优于现有先进反卷积基线方法。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 空间转录组技术可同时测量基因表达与空间位置信息，但由于每个spot通常包含多种细胞类型，其下游分析面临挑战。细胞类型反卷积旨在整合单细胞RNA测序与空间转录组数据，推断每个spot中的细胞类型组成。针对现有方法依赖预定义标志基因、在标志信息不完整或缺失时性能受限的问题，研究提出SA2E——一种空间感知自编码框架，无需预定义细胞类型生物标志物即可进行反卷积。该方法通过空间正则化自编码器学习spot的潜在表示，以保留空间图中的局部拓扑结构；在此基础上，通过约束细胞类型特征对空间转录组表达进行重构来学习细胞类型签名。框架中，已知比例的模拟空间转录组数据用于监督预训练，而真实空间转录组数据则通过重构目标进行优化。在模拟和真实数据集上的广泛实验表明，SA2E的表现优于当前先进的反卷积基线方法。

papers.title: Live-cell imaging of RNA dynamics using bright and stable fluorescent RNAs
papers.summary: This protocol provides guidelines for using fluorescent RNAs, entities consisting of an RNA aptamer bound to its cognate fluorogenic dye, for live imaging of the localization and dynamics of different RNA species in bacteria and mammalian cells
papers.llm_title_zh: 利用高亮度且稳定的荧光RNA进行RNA动态的活细胞成像
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 利用高亮度且稳定的荧光RNA进行RNA动态的活细胞成像 / Live-cell imaging of RNA dynamics using bright and stable fluorescent RNAs
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何利用高亮度且稳定的荧光RNA，在细菌和哺乳动物细胞中实现不同RNA种类定位及动态过程的活细胞成像？
llm_highlights_zh: 介绍利用荧光RNA在活细胞中成像不同RNA种类的定位与动态变化的方法。
荧光RNA由RNA适配体及其匹配的荧光生成染料组成，强调其高亮度与稳定性。
方案适用于细菌和哺乳动物细胞中的RNA活细胞成像研究。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 本文提供了一套使用荧光RNA进行活细胞成像的实验指南。荧光RNA由RNA适配体与其对应的荧光生成染料结合而成，可用于观察细菌和哺乳动物细胞中不同RNA分子的定位与动态变化。

all_papers.title: The B cell receptor–mTOR signaling axis restricts the accumulation of lung tissue–resident memory B cells after influenza infection
all_papers.abstract: Lung tissue-resident memory B (BRM) cells are important in establishing protective immunity against respiratory pathogens. However, the pathways regulating the accumulation of lung BRM cells are poorly understood. Here, we show that the transcription factors NFATC1 (nuclear factor of activated T cells 1) and EGR2 (early growth response 2) repress lung BRM cell accumulation after influenza infection, whereas IKZF1 (IKAROS family zinc finger 1) enhances it. IKZF1 restrains B cell receptor (BCR) and mTOR (mechanistic target of rapamycin) signaling and is highly expressed in lung BRM cells during their development. Lung BRM cells display reduced expression of genes associated with BCR and mTOR signaling pathways. Overexpression of a degradation-resistant form of SYK downstream of the BCR restricted lung BRM cell accumulation. Conversely, inhibition of mTOR using rapamycin reduced NFATC1 and EGR2 expression and promoted lung BRM cell accumulation. These findings establish how the BCR-mTOR signaling axis regulates mucosal B cell responses after influenza infection.
affiliations: Department of Medicine, Washington University School of Medicine, St. Louis, MO, USA.
Veterans Administration Hospital, St. Louis, MO, USA.
all_papers.llm_title_zh: B细胞受体–mTOR信号轴限制流感感染后肺组织驻留记忆B细胞的积累
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: B细胞受体–mTOR信号轴限制流感感染后肺组织驻留记忆B细胞的积累 / The B cell receptor–mTOR signaling axis restricts the accumulation of lung tissue–resident memory B cells after influenza infection
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 流感感染后，B细胞受体（BCR）-mTOR信号轴及相关转录因子如何调控肺组织驻留记忆B细胞的积累？
llm_highlights_zh: 流感感染后，NFATC1与EGR2抑制肺组织驻留记忆B细胞积累，而IKZF1促进其积累。
肺组织驻留记忆B细胞发育过程中高表达IKZF1，并呈现BCR与mTOR信号相关基因表达下调。
增强BCR下游SYK信号限制肺BRM细胞积累，而雷帕霉素抑制mTOR可促进其积累。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 发表于《Science Immunology》2026年3月，第11卷第117期。
all_papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh: 肺组织驻留记忆B（BRM）细胞对于建立针对呼吸道病原体的保护性免疫至关重要。然而，调控肺BRM细胞积累的通路目前尚不清楚。本文显示，在流感感染后，转录因子NFATC1（活化T细胞核因子1）和EGR2（早期生长反应2）抑制肺BRM细胞的积累，而IKZF1（IKAROS家族锌指蛋白1）则促进其积累。IKZF1可抑制B细胞受体（BCR）及mTOR（雷帕霉素机械靶蛋白）信号，并在肺BRM细胞发育过程中呈高表达。肺BRM细胞表现出与BCR和mTOR信号通路相关基因表达降低的特征。过表达一种抗降解的BCR下游SYK形式可限制肺BRM细胞积累。相反，使用雷帕霉素抑制mTOR可降低NFATC1和EGR2的表达，并促进肺BRM细胞积累。上述发现阐明了BCR-mTOR信号轴如何在流感感染后调控黏膜B细胞应答。

all_papers.title: Macrophages restrict tumor immune infiltration by controlling collagen topography
all_papers.abstract: During tumorigenesis, the extracellular matrix is extensively remodeled. Whereas the impact of such remodeling on tumor growth and invasion is well described, the consequences on immune infiltration are not well understood. Combining tissue imaging and machine learning, we show that immune cell localization in tumors can be predicted by the local topography of fibrillar collagens. Such topographies are dictated by a fibrotic pathway driven by transcription factor 4 (Tcf4) in both cancer and stromal cells, which promotes collagen III deposition and results in intermingled collagen networks that favor intratumor infiltration of T cells and neutrophils. Macrophages inhibit this pathway, highlighting their key structural role in shaping the tumor extracellular matrix. Reanalysis of data from human solid tumors revealed a strong correlation between TCF4, COL3A1, and T cell and neutrophil signatures. Together, our data identify collagen network topographies as a key regulator of tumor-infiltrating immune cells.
affiliations: Institut Curie, PSL University, INSERM U932, Immunity and Cancer, Paris, France.
Université Paris-Cité, Paris, France.
Institut Curie, Université PSL, Sorbonne Université, CNRS UMR168, Physics of Cells and Cancer, Paris, France.

Chimie ParisTech, Université PSL, CNRS, Institut de Recherche de Chimie Paris, Paris, France.
Department of Life Technologies, University of Turku, Turku, Finland.

mesh_terms: Basic Helix-Loop-Helix Leucine Zipper Transcription Factors
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 巨噬细胞通过控制胶原拓扑结构限制肿瘤免疫浸润
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 巨噬细胞通过控制胶原拓扑结构限制肿瘤免疫浸润 / Macrophages restrict tumor immune infiltration by controlling collagen topography
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 肿瘤细胞外基质中胶原拓扑结构如何影响免疫细胞浸润，以及巨噬细胞是否通过调控Tcf4相关纤维化通路来限制肿瘤免疫浸润？
llm_highlights_zh: 肿瘤内免疫细胞定位可由局部纤维状胶原的拓扑结构预测。
Tcf4驱动的纤维化程序促进Ⅲ型胶原沉积，并形成有利于T细胞和中性粒细胞肿瘤内浸润的交织胶原网络。
巨噬细胞通过抑制该通路限制免疫浸润，提示其在塑造肿瘤细胞外基质结构中的关键作用。
all_papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh: 在肿瘤发生过程中，细胞外基质会发生广泛重塑。尽管这种重塑对肿瘤生长和侵袭的影响已有较充分描述，但其对免疫浸润的后果尚未得到充分理解。本文结合组织成像与机器学习，表明肿瘤中免疫细胞的定位可由局部纤维状胶原的拓扑结构加以预测。该类拓扑结构由癌细胞和基质细胞中转录因子4（Tcf4）驱动的纤维化通路所决定，该通路促进Ⅲ型胶原沉积，并形成交织的胶原网络，从而有利于T细胞和中性粒细胞向肿瘤内部浸润。巨噬细胞可抑制这一通路，凸显其在塑造肿瘤细胞外基质中的关键结构性作用。对人类实体瘤数据的再分析显示，TCF4、COL3A1与T细胞及中性粒细胞特征之间存在强相关性。综上，研究将胶原网络拓扑结构确定为调控肿瘤浸润免疫细胞的重要因素。

all_papers.title: Immune mechanisms of congenital Zika syndrome
all_papers.abstract: Zika virus (ZIKV) infection during pregnancy can adversely affect mother and child. ZIKV can vertically transmit from mother to fetus, especially during early pregnancy, to cause congenital Zika syndrome (CZS), which includes microcephaly, ocular and musculoskeletal defects, and other disorders. Whereas human clinical studies have provided crucial insights into how ZIKV affects pregnancy, animal models have uncovered mechanisms of fetal disease. This Review discusses fetal immunological factors that contribute to or protect from CZS, as well as the interplay between maternal and fetal immunity, viral molecular factors, maternal nutrition, and metabolic changes to fetal ZIKV infection and disease outcomes. We also consider how factors like preexisting flavivirus immunity and gene polymorphisms may affect CZS risk, with implications for vaccine and therapeutic development. There are insights to be gained from studying ZIKV disease for our improved understanding of congenital infections and the functioning of the immune system in early life.
affiliations: Programme in Emerging Infectious Diseases, Duke-National University of Singapore Medical School, Singapore 169857, Singapore.
Department of Pathology, Duke University Medical Center, Durham, NC 27705, USA.
Department of Microbiology and Immunology, Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine, National University of Singapore, Singapore, Singapore.
SingHealth Duke-NUS Global Health Institute, Singapore, Singapore.
SingHealth Duke-NUS Maternal and Child Health Research Institute, Singapore, Singapore.
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 先天性寨卡综合征的免疫机制
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 先天性寨卡综合征的免疫机制 / Immune mechanisms of congenital Zika syndrome
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 妊娠期寨卡病毒感染中，哪些胎儿免疫因素及母胎免疫、病毒分子特征、母体营养与代谢、既往黄病毒免疫和宿主遗传差异共同决定先天性寨卡综合征的发生风险与疾病结局？
llm_highlights_zh: 妊娠期寨卡病毒感染可经母胎垂直传播，导致先天性寨卡综合征及小头畸形、眼部和肌肉骨骼异常等表现。
本文综述胎儿免疫因素及母胎免疫互作如何影响胎儿感染与疾病结局，并结合动物模型阐释相关机制。
既往黄病毒免疫、基因多态性、母体营养与代谢改变可能调节先天性寨卡综合征风险，对疫苗和治疗开发具有意义。
all_papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh: 妊娠期寨卡病毒（ZIKV）感染可对母亲和胎儿/新生儿造成不良影响。ZIKV可由母体垂直传播至胎儿，尤其在妊娠早期，从而引发先天性寨卡综合征（CZS），其表现包括小头畸形、眼部和肌肉骨骼缺陷以及其他异常。尽管人类临床研究为理解ZIKV如何影响妊娠提供了关键见解，动物模型则揭示了胎儿疾病发生的机制。本文综述了促成或保护机体免于发生CZS的胎儿免疫学因素，以及母体与胎儿免疫、病毒分子因素、母体营养和代谢变化如何共同影响胎儿ZIKV感染及其疾病结局。作者还讨论了既往黄病毒免疫和基因多态性等因素可能如何影响CZS风险，并指出这些认识对疫苗和治疗策略开发具有启示意义。对ZIKV疾病的研究也有助于深化我们对先天性感染及生命早期免疫系统功能的理解。

all_papers.title: Erratum for the Research Article “TCRγ constant usage tunes human γδ T cell antigen sensitivity, thymic programming, and peripheral function”
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 研究论文“TCRγ恒定区使用调节人γδ T细胞的抗原敏感性、胸腺程序化及外周功能”的勘误
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 《研究论文“TCRγ恒定区使用调节人γδ T细胞的抗原敏感性、胸腺程序化及外周功能”的勘误》 / Erratum for the Research Article “TCRγ constant usage tunes human γδ T cell antigen sensitivity, thymic programming, and peripheral function”
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 本文为勘误，旨在更正原研究文章《TCRγ constant usage tunes human γδ T cell antigen sensitivity, thymic programming, and peripheral function》中的相关内容；当前来源未提供具体更正细节。
llm_highlights_zh: 本文为已发表研究文章的勘误通知。
期刊为《Science Immunology》，发表于2026年3月20日。
当前来源未提供摘要、作者及关键词等具体内容。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 《Science Immunology》2026年3月，第11卷，第117期。本条目为研究文章《TCRγ constant usage tunes human γδ T cell antigen sensitivity, thymic programming, and peripheral function》的勘误通知。

all_papers.title: Whole-genome prediction of bacterial pathogenic capacity on novel bacteria using protein language models with PathogenFinder2
all_papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Infectious diseases continue to be a leading cause of mortality and pose a significant global health threat. Thus, the development of tools for surveillance and early detection of emerging pathogens is needed. Results We introduce PathogenFinder2, a novel, alignment-free, taxonomy-agnostic model for predicting bacterial pathogenic capacity in humans using protein language models. It outperforms previous methods, particularly for novel taxa, and provides interpretable outputs by highlighting proteins most relevant to pathogenic potential. These insights aid the identification of virulence factors, vaccine targets, and infection-related metabolic pathways. Furthermore, we introduce the Bacterial Pathogenic Capacity Landscape, which reveals patterns linked to host condition, infection site, microbial antagonism, and environmental origin. Availability The model is freely available online at https://genepi.dk/pathogenfinder2 , or as a standalone program ( https://github.com/genomicepidemiology/PathogenFinder2 )
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 利用PathogenFinder2结合蛋白质语言模型对新型细菌进行细菌致病能力的全基因组预测
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 利用PathogenFinder2结合蛋白质语言模型对新型细菌进行细菌致病能力的全基因组预测 / Whole-genome prediction of bacterial pathogenic capacity on novel bacteria using protein language models with PathogenFinder2
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何利用基于蛋白质语言模型的全基因组方法，在不依赖序列比对和分类学先验的情况下，准确预测新型细菌对人类的致病能力，并提供具有生物学解释性的结果？
llm_highlights_zh: PathogenFinder2是一种基于蛋白质语言模型的全基因组、免比对且不依赖分类学信息的细菌致病能力预测方法。
该模型在人类细菌致病潜力预测中优于既有方法，尤其适用于新分类群细菌的判别。
模型可提供可解释输出，定位与致病潜力相关的关键蛋白，并辅助识别毒力因子、疫苗靶点及感染相关代谢通路。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 感染性疾病仍是导致死亡的重要原因，并构成全球公共卫生威胁，因此亟需用于监测和早期识别新发病原体的工具。该研究提出PathogenFinder2，这是一种新的、免比对且不依赖分类学信息的模型，利用蛋白质语言模型预测细菌对人类的致病能力。结果显示，该方法优于既往模型，尤其在新分类群细菌上的表现更佳；同时可通过突出显示与致病潜力最相关的蛋白质提供可解释性输出。这些信息有助于识别毒力因子、疫苗靶点以及感染相关代谢通路。研究还提出“细菌致病能力图谱”，揭示了与宿主状态、感染部位、微生物拮抗作用及环境来源相关的模式。模型可在线使用，亦提供独立程序版本。

all_papers.title: TGF-β mediates epigenetic control of innate antiviral responses and SIV reservoir size
all_papers.summary: Epigenetic programming of myeloid and CD4+ T cells promotes decay of the SIV reservoir in rhesus macaques and a similar molecular pathway is found in HIV elite controllers
all_papers.llm_title_zh: TGF-β介导先天性抗病毒反应及SIV储存库大小的表观遗传调控
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: TGF-β介导先天性抗病毒反应及SIV储存库大小的表观遗传调控 / TGF-β mediates epigenetic control of innate antiviral responses and SIV reservoir size
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 本研究探讨TGF-β是否通过表观遗传调控髓系细胞和CD4+ T细胞的先天性抗病毒反应，从而影响恒河猴SIV储存库大小，并评估类似分子通路是否存在于HIV精英控制者中。
llm_highlights_zh: TGF-β通过表观遗传机制调控先天性抗病毒反应及SIV储存库大小。
在恒河猴中，髓系细胞与CD4+ T细胞的表观遗传重编程与SIV储存库衰减相关。
类似分子通路也见于HIV精英控制者，提示其可能具有跨物种与转化研究意义。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 研究指出，髓系细胞和CD4+ T细胞的表观遗传编程可促进恒河猴SIV储存库的衰减；同时，在HIV精英控制者中也观察到相似的分子通路，提示TGF-β介导的表观遗传调控可能参与病毒储存库控制。

all_papers.title: SpliceHarmonization: an integrated method for identifying RNA splicing events in therapeutics for splicing modulation
all_papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Splicing, a critical co-transcriptional process in eukaryotes, enhances transcriptome diversity by generating isoforms specific to cell types, tissues, or developmental stages. Recent advancements in splicing modulators have opened new avenues for targeting previously undruggable genes by inducing significant perturbations in splicing events. These developments underscore the need for comprehensive methods to accurately identify and compare splicing events. While several tools have been developed to detect local splice variants, inconsistencies across methods remain a significant challenge. To address this, we present SpliceHarmonization, an integrated approach that combines the strengths of rMATS, LeafCutter, and MAJIQ, enabling robust and reliable splicing analysis with event type annotations. Results In a comprehensive evaluation using diverse simulated datasets, SpliceHarmonization streamlined and standardized the outputs from three detection methods into a unified format, thereby improving splicing detection with event type annotation and outperforming individual methods. By integrating the outputs from rMATS, LeafCutter and MAJIQ, our approach not only enhanced identification of a wide range of splicing events but also effectively mitigated method-specific discrepancies. This integration led to an accuracy exceeding 0.8 and a recall of up to 0.5, with an observed increase in AUC of up to 10%. Furthermore, SpliceHarmonization demonstrated high sensitivity in detecting low-abundance and complex splicing events, providing annotations including genomic coordinates and event type. Availability and implementation SpliceHarmonization is available at https://github.com/interactivereport/SpliceHarmonization
all_papers.abstract:
MOTIVATION: Splicing, a critical co-transcriptional process in eukaryotes, enhances transcriptome diversity by generating isoforms specific to cell types, tissues, or developmental stages. Recent advancements in splicing modulators have opened new avenues for targeting previously undruggable genes by inducing significant perturbations in splicing events. These developments underscore the need for comprehensive methods to accurately identify and compare splicing events. While several tools have been developed to detect local splice variants, inconsistencies across methods remain a significant challenge. To address this, we present SpliceHarmonization, an integrated approach that combines the strengths of rMATS, LeafCutter, and MAJIQ, enabling robust and reliable splicing analysis with event type annotations.

RESULTS: In a comprehensive evaluation using diverse simulated datasets, SpliceHarmonization streamlined and standardized the outputs from three detection methods into a unified format, thereby improving splicing detection with event type annotation and outperforming individual methods. By integrating the outputs from rMATS, LeafCutter and MAJIQ, our approach not only enhanced identification of a wide range of splicing events but also effectively mitigated method-specific discrepancies. This integration led to an accuracy exceeding 0.8 and a recall of up to 0.5, with an observed increase in AUC of up to 10%. Furthermore, SpliceHarmonization demonstrated high sensitivity in detecting low-abundance and complex splicing events, providing annotations including genomic coordinates and event type.

AVAILABILITY AND IMPLEMENTATION: SpliceHarmonization is available at https://github.com/interactivereport/SpliceHarmonization.

SUPPLEMENTARY INFORMATION: Supplementary Materials and Supplementary Methods are available at Bioinformatics online. Supplementary Data is available at https://zenodo.org/records/15032402.
affiliations: Genomics and Computational Biology, Biomarkers and Systems Biology, Biogen Inc, Cambridge, MA 02142, United States.
Data Science, BioInfoRx Inc, Madison, WI 53719, United States.
all_papers.llm_title_zh: SpliceHarmonization：一种用于识别剪接调节治疗中RNA剪接事件的整合方法
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: SpliceHarmonization：一种用于识别剪接调节治疗中RNA剪接事件的整合方法 / SpliceHarmonization: an integrated method for identifying RNA splicing events in therapeutics for splicing modulation
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 作者旨在解决现有RNA剪接事件检测工具之间结果不一致的问题，评估一种整合rMATS、LeafCutter与MAJIQ输出的方法，是否能够更准确、稳健地识别并注释用于剪接调节治疗研究中的RNA剪接事件。
llm_highlights_zh: SpliceHarmonization整合rMATS、LeafCutter与MAJIQ，实现剪接事件检测结果的统一化与标准化。
在多样化模拟数据评估中，该方法整体性能优于单一工具，准确率超过0.8，AUC最高提升10%。
该方法对低丰度及复杂剪接事件具有较高敏感性，并可提供基因组坐标与事件类型注释。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 该研究提出SpliceHarmonization，用于整合rMATS、LeafCutter和MAJIQ三种RNA剪接检测工具的输出，并将结果标准化为统一格式。基于多种模拟数据集的评估显示，该方法在剪接事件识别、事件类型注释以及低丰度和复杂事件检测方面优于单一工具，准确率超过0.8，召回率最高达0.5，AUC最高提升10%。该工具可支持剪接调节治疗相关研究中的系统性剪接分析。
all_papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh:
【研究动机】剪接是真核生物中关键的共转录过程，通过产生具有细胞类型、组织或发育阶段特异性的异构体来增强转录组多样性。近年来，剪接调节剂的发展通过诱导显著的剪接事件扰动，为靶向以往难以成药的基因开辟了新途径。这些进展凸显了对全面方法的需求，以便准确识别和比较剪接事件。尽管已有多种工具可用于检测局部剪接变体，但不同方法之间结果不一致仍是重要挑战。为此，作者提出SpliceHarmonization，这是一种整合性方法，结合了rMATS、LeafCutter和MAJIQ的优势，可实现稳健且可靠的剪接分析，并提供事件类型注释。

【结果】在采用多种模拟数据集进行的综合评估中，SpliceHarmonization将3种检测方法的输出进行了梳理和标准化，统一为单一格式，从而提升了带有事件类型注释的剪接检测性能，并优于各单独方法。通过整合rMATS、LeafCutter和MAJIQ的输出，该方法不仅增强了对广泛剪接事件的识别能力，还有效减轻了方法特异性差异带来的影响。整合后准确率超过0.8，召回率最高可达0.5，AUC最高提升10%。此外，SpliceHarmonization在检测低丰度和复杂剪接事件方面表现出较高敏感性，并可提供包括基因组坐标和事件类型在内的注释信息。

【可获取性与实现】SpliceHarmonization可在https://github.com/interactivereport/SpliceHarmonization获取。

【补充信息】补充材料与补充方法可于Bioinformatics在线版获取；补充数据可见https://zenodo.org/records/15032402。

all_papers.title: SA2E: spatial-aware auto-encoder for cell type deconvolution of spatial transcriptomics data
all_papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Spatial transcriptomics (ST) technologies measure gene expression together with spatial locations, but each spot typically contains a mixture of cell types, posing a challenge for downstream analysis. Cell-type deconvolution aims to infer spot-wise cell-type proportions by integrating single-cell RNA-seq (scRNA-seq) and ST data. Many existing methods construct cell-type signatures from predefined marker genes, which can limit performance when marker information is incomplete or unavailable. Results To address this limitation, we propose a spatial-aware auto-encoder framework (SA2E) for cell-type deconvolution without requiring predefined cell-type biomarkers. SA2E learns latent spot representations using a spatially regularized auto-encoder that preserves the local topology of the spot spatial graph. Based on these representations, SA2E learns cell-type signatures by enforcing them to reconstruct ST expression. In our framework, simulated ST data with known proportions are used for supervised pretraining, while real ST data are optimized using the reconstruction objective. Extensive experiments on simulated and real ST datasets demonstrate that SA2E outperforms state-of-the-art deconvolution baselines. Availability and implementation The code of SA2E is available at Github ( https://github.com/xkmaxidian/SA2E ) and Zenodo (
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 用于空间转录组数据细胞类型反卷积的空间感知自编码器
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 用于空间转录组数据细胞类型反卷积的空间感知自编码器 / SA2E: spatial-aware auto-encoder for cell type deconvolution of spatial transcriptomics data
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何在缺乏预定义细胞类型标志基因的情况下，结合空间转录组与单细胞RNA测序数据，利用空间信息实现spot水平的细胞类型比例准确反卷积？
llm_highlights_zh: 提出SA2E，一种无需预定义细胞类型标志物的空间感知自编码反卷积框架。
通过空间正则化自编码器学习保留局部空间拓扑的spot潜在表示，并据此学习细胞类型特征。
在模拟与真实空间转录组数据上的实验表明，SA2E优于现有先进反卷积基线方法。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 空间转录组技术可同时测量基因表达与空间位置信息，但由于每个spot通常包含多种细胞类型，其下游分析面临挑战。细胞类型反卷积旨在整合单细胞RNA测序与空间转录组数据，推断每个spot中的细胞类型组成。针对现有方法依赖预定义标志基因、在标志信息不完整或缺失时性能受限的问题，研究提出SA2E——一种空间感知自编码框架，无需预定义细胞类型生物标志物即可进行反卷积。该方法通过空间正则化自编码器学习spot的潜在表示，以保留空间图中的局部拓扑结构；在此基础上，通过约束细胞类型特征对空间转录组表达进行重构来学习细胞类型签名。框架中，已知比例的模拟空间转录组数据用于监督预训练，而真实空间转录组数据则通过重构目标进行优化。在模拟和真实数据集上的广泛实验表明，SA2E的表现优于当前先进的反卷积基线方法。

all_papers.title: Live-cell imaging of RNA dynamics using bright and stable fluorescent RNAs
all_papers.summary: This protocol provides guidelines for using fluorescent RNAs, entities consisting of an RNA aptamer bound to its cognate fluorogenic dye, for live imaging of the localization and dynamics of different RNA species in bacteria and mammalian cells
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 利用高亮度且稳定的荧光RNA进行RNA动态的活细胞成像
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 利用高亮度且稳定的荧光RNA进行RNA动态的活细胞成像 / Live-cell imaging of RNA dynamics using bright and stable fluorescent RNAs
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何利用高亮度且稳定的荧光RNA，在细菌和哺乳动物细胞中实现不同RNA种类定位及动态过程的活细胞成像？
llm_highlights_zh: 介绍利用荧光RNA在活细胞中成像不同RNA种类的定位与动态变化的方法。
荧光RNA由RNA适配体及其匹配的荧光生成染料组成，强调其高亮度与稳定性。
方案适用于细菌和哺乳动物细胞中的RNA活细胞成像研究。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 本文提供了一套使用荧光RNA进行活细胞成像的实验指南。荧光RNA由RNA适配体与其对应的荧光生成染料结合而成，可用于观察细菌和哺乳动物细胞中不同RNA分子的定位与动态变化。
